negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_076
prompt: A close-up view captures a pair of hands working meticulously on a red fabric item placed on a purple textured surface. The hands, one adorned with a silver ring, gently smooth out the fabric, which features a white strip running horizontally across its center. The hands lift the red fabric to reveal a vibrant blue patterned lining underneath the white strip. They then carefully fold the red fabric over the blue patterned lining, aligning the edges precisely. The hands press down on the folded edge to secure it in place. Finally, the hands rotate the folded item, showcasing the completed side with the blue patterned lining prominently visible.
